top_signals.title: Opening speech by President von der Leyen at the New European Bauhaus Festival 2026
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 09 Jun 2026 Dear António,
Dear Members of the European Parliament,
Dear Commissioners,
Ladies and gentlemen,
Dear friends of the New European Bauhaus,
It is good to be here...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Two Crew Missing After Tanker Engine Room Fire off Oman
top_signals.summary: Two crew members were missing on Wednesday after a fire started in the engine room of a tanker 20 nautical miles northeast of Oman's Sohar, The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations agency said.UKMTO reported one casualty, without giving further details, and did not report the cause of the fire.(
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
